name: Grade 5 Robotics & Electronics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 5 pathway for combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Robotics & Electronics. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 5 knowledge and transferable skills in combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Robotics & Electronics.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Robotics & Electronics
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about combining ideas, revising work, and conducting guided inquiry through Robotics & Electronics and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
